title: Oru Devathai Vanthuvittal Lyrics Nee Varuvai Ena
stanzas: <div>Oru Devathai Vanthuvittal Lyrics Nee Varuvai Ena

devathai vanthu vitaal
unnai thaediye
vanna maalaigal sooda vandhaal
thanga thaerile

Oru devathai vanthu vitaal
ennai thaediye
vanna maalaigal sooda vandhaal
thanga thaerile

nooru nooru jenmem vazhndhirukka
noolil poovaipola saendhirukka
Deepam yaetri vaithu thaerizhukka
selai solai kondu saerthanaikka
punnagayil poo pooparikka

devathai vanthu vitaal
ennai thaediye
vanna maalaigal sooda vandhaal
thanga thaerile

pookkum sediyai ellaam
sirikkum poovei ellaam
un peyerai kettirundhaen

ettu thisaiyum serthu
ottrai thisaiyaai maatri
un varavaai paarthurinthen

kannukul kannukul undhan bimbam
nenjukul nenjukul undhan sandham
ullathai ullathai alli thanthaen
unidum unidum ennai thanthen

en nizhalil nee nadakka
en uyiril unnai vaithaen

devathai vanthu vitaal
ennai thaediye
vanna maalaigal sooda vandhaal
thanga thaerile
roja chedigal nattu
uyirai neeraai vittu
koonthalukku poo valarpaen

vetkam veesum roja
veliyil varum nerathil
veyilukku thadai vidhippaen

anbae un paathangal nogum endru
anggange poovalae paathai saiven
kanne un vaasathil naan irukka
kaatridam yosanai kaettuvaipen

en nizhalil nee nadakka
en uyiril unnai vaithaen

devathai vanthu vitaal
ennai thaediye
vanna maalaigal sooda vandhaal
thanga thaerile

nooru nooru jenmem vazhndhirukka
noolil poovaipola saendhirukka
Deepam yaetri vaithu thaerizhukka
selai solai kondu saerthanaikka
punnagayil poo pooparikka

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, portraying the emotions of searching for a beloved.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Nee Varuvai Ena.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan.

What year was this song released?

This song was released in 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Devathai Vanthuvittal, the lyrics beautifully convey the feelings of yearning and the search for love. Set against the backdrop of Nee Varuvai Ena, the song encapsulates the essence of romantic longing, making it a perfect choice for intimate moments. The soothing melody and heartfelt delivery evoke a sense of nostalgia, resonating deeply with listeners. This timeless classic remains a cherished favorite for those celebrating love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Devathai Vanthuvittal is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of longing and love. With Nee Varuvai Ena as its backdrop, this song showcases the soulful voice of Hariharan, complemented by the enchanting music of S.A. Rajkumar. Dive into a world of romance and nostalgia with this timeless classic that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: If a goddess comes, searching for you, colorful garlands will come to the golden chariot.
If a goddess comes, searching for me, colorful garlands will come to the golden chariot.
In the book of a hundred lives, like a flower, I will bloom. With a lamp, I will light up the path and gather the flowers in the garden.
If a goddess comes, searching for me, colorful garlands will come to the golden chariot.
Every flower that blooms will smile, I have heard your name.
I have combined all directions into one and waited for your arrival.
In your eyes, there is a reflection of me, in my heart, there is a sound of you, I have given myself to you.
In my shadow, you walk, I have placed you in my life.
If a goddess comes, searching for me, colorful garlands will come to the golden chariot. I will nurture the flowers for the earth's life, giving up the water of the rose petals.
When the wind blows, I will block the sunlight that comes in the open.
My love, your paths hurt, I will take the path of the flower. I will stay in your place, listening to the wind's thoughts.
In my shadow, you walk, I have placed you in my life.
If a goddess comes, searching for me, colorful garlands will come to the golden chariot.
In the book of a hundred lives, like a flower, I will bloom. With a lamp, I will light up the path and gather the flowers in the garden.
